Class CodeRefinementIntent

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.coderefiner.CodeRefinementIntent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class CodeRefinementIntent extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a single structural AST modification instruction in a flattened format.

This intent is processed by the BatchCodeRefiner to perform surgical, AST-guided text replacements on Java source files.

See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Defines the types of structural modifications available for a CodeRefinementIntent.

  • Field Details

    • type

      private CodeRefinementIntent.Type type
      The type of structural modification to perform (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, MOVE).

    • classFqn

      private String classFqn
      The fully qualified name of the target class container. Used for resolving the container during structural inserts. Nested types should use the '$' separator.

    • memberFqn

      private String memberFqn
      The absolute fully qualified name of the target member to perform the operation on. Supports methods, fields, and inner classes. Method FQNs must include full parameter types (type erasure applied).

    • declaration

      private String declaration
      The exact string declaration (signature) of the member. This should include modifiers, return types, and parameter lists but NOT the body or Javadoc.

    • innerBlockOrInitializer

      private String innerBlockOrInitializer
      The code body or initializer expression. For methods, this is the code inside the braces. For fields, it is the expression following the assignment operator.

    • position

      private RelativePosition position
      The relative position constraint for insertion or moving operations. Requires an anchor member if using BEFORE or AFTER.

    • anchorMemberName

      private String anchorMemberName
      The simple name or signature of the anchor member to position against. Used in conjunction with RelativePosition.

    • reason

      private String reason
      A human-readable reason explaining the intent. Visible in the UI during the refinement review phase.

    • javadoc

      private JavadocIntent javadoc
      The structured Javadoc configuration to apply to the member. Allows for synchronous documentation and code updates.

  • Constructor Details

    • CodeRefinementIntent

      public CodeRefinementIntent()

  • Method Details

    • validate

      public void validate() throws AgiToolException
      Validates the intent before execution to ensure all mandatory fields are populated correctly based on the intent type. This pre-flight check guarantees that the intent is structurally sound before AST parsing begins.
      Throws:
      AgiToolException - if the intent configuration is invalid.

    • toDiagnosticString

      public String toDiagnosticString()
      Generates a formatted diagnostic string detailing the intent's configuration.
      Returns:
      a multi-line diagnostic string.

    • abbreviate

      private String abbreviate(String s, int max)
      Abbreviates a string for compact logging.
      Parameters:
      s - the string to abbreviate.
      max - the maximum allowed length.
      Returns:
      the abbreviated string.

    • applyToText

      public String applyToText(org.netbeans.api.java.source.CompilationController cc, String currentContent) throws Exception
      Executes the V4 AST-Guided text replacement, calculating exact bounds via the NetBeans compiler API.
      Parameters:
      cc - the compilation controller.
      currentContent - the raw text content of the file.
      Returns:
      the updated text content.
      Throws:
      Exception - if parsing or string replacement fails.

    • getHtmlDisplay

      public String getHtmlDisplay()
      Generates a rich HTML representation of this intent for UI rendering.
      Returns:
      an HTML-formatted string.

    • getResultingMemberFqn

      public String getResultingMemberFqn()
      Calculates the expected fully qualified name of the member after this intent is applied.
      Returns:
      the resulting FQN, or null if deleted.

    • getSimpleName

      private String getSimpleName(String fqn)
      Extracts the simple name from a fully qualified name.
      Parameters:
      fqn - the fully qualified name.
      Returns:
      the simple name.

    • getSimpleNameFromDeclaration

      private String getSimpleNameFromDeclaration(String decl)
      Parses a member declaration string to extract its simple name.
      Parameters:
      decl - the declaration string.
      Returns:
      the simple name.
